positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u28,negated_conjecture,
    frozen_series(hachi)).

cnf(u31,negated_conjecture,
    ~excessive_content(hachi)).

cnf(u38,axiom,
    appropriate_for_all_ages(hachi)).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    family_friendly_animated(hachi)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~family_friendly_animated(X0) | rated_ga(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~appropriate_for_all_ages(X0) | can_watch_without_guidance(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~rated_ga(X0) | appropriate_for_all_ages(X0)).

cnf(u44,axiom,
    can_watch_without_guidance(hachi)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~excessive_content(X0) | ~can_watch_without_guidance(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~frozen_series(X0) | family_friendly_animated(X0)).

cnf(u51,axiom,
    rated_ga(hachi)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define film(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
